Petition To Lift Temporary Suspension And Reinstate Co Trustee Anthony F Quinones Full Accounting Of Trust Property Removed By Lynn Beuchemin And Felicia Volkman, Repayment Of Loans And Assessment Of Financial Responsibility
Off Calendar Oct-02-2007 Continued To Jan-09-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Anthony Quinones Accounting
Off Calendar Oct-02-2007 Continued To Jan-09-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Kevin Ford appearing for and with Lynn Quinones. Antohony Quinones appearing in Propria Persona.
Mr. Quinones explained to the Court that he was not able to attend the mediation and that he still wants to resolve the matter. Mr. Ford informed the Court that mediation did not take place due to Mr. Quinones absence and requested another mediation. The Court informed counsel and parties that the medaition was to be done informally. The Court continued the matter to 01/09/08 for status on the mediation. If mediation is successful, Mr. Quinones petition for reinstatement will be taken off calendar.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Bailiff: Tony Aguerre Clerk: Rosie Noguera

Petition To Lift Temporary Suspension And Reinstate Co Trustee Anthony F Quinones Full Accounting Of Trust Property Removed By Lynn Beuchemin And Felicia Volkman, Repayment Of Loans And Assessment Of Financial Responsibility
Off Calendar Sep-11-2007 Continued To Oct-02-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Kevin Ford appearing for and with Lynn Quinones (current successor trustee). Anthony Quinones appearing in propria persona.
Mr. Quinones reported that he has not been able to comlplete the aocounting because of the inaccessability of two accounts. He also reported that he was unable to move out of home due to his current financial status. The court directed Mr. Quinones to do the accounting on what he has available and to do an inventory on the valuables in the home.. The Court also directed Mr. Quinones to sit down with Mr. Ford and his sisters to try to work this out. Mr Ford expressed that he would like to see an accounting and an inventory completed by Mr. Quinones. The parties are willing to mediate. If the parties are unable to resolve the issues, the matter will be referred to Pro Bono Mediation. The Court continued the matter to 10/02/2007 for status on the mediation.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Anthony Quinones Accounting
Off Calendar Sep-11-2007 Continued To Oct-02-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Lift Temporary Suspension And Reinstate Co Trustee Anthony F Quinones Full Accounting Of Trust Property Removed By Lynn Beuchemin And Felicia Volkman, Repayment Of Loans And Assessment Of Financial Responsibility
Off Calendar Jul-25-2007 Continued To Sep-11-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Kevin Ford appearing for and with co-trustee Lynn Quinones. Anthony Quinones is not in Court. This is his petition. He has not filed an accounting. The issues left are the personal properties and Anthony Quinones's accounting. Mr. Ford requested to have the petition dismissed. Court is not dismissing it at this time. Matter is continued to 9/11. Mr. Ford will notify Mr. Quinones to appear on 9/11.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: De Leon.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (318 Arleta Ave., San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jul-12-2007 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Kevin Ford appearing for and with petitioner. Anthony Quinones is in Court. He asked for permission to speak regarding the sale. John Kenny, agent from Century 21 is also in court. Mr. Quinones has a hearing set on 7/11. He requested for continuance. Mr. Ford objected to the continuance. Sergio Interno, a bidder stated he was not allowed to see the property. He requested for continuance to see the property. Mr. Ford requested to have the sale go forward today subject to the bidder being able to get in to see the property in a week. Court agreed to have the sale go forward today with the condition stated by counsel. Bid is increased to $1,029,500.00. N/B. The conditions of the sale are if the bidder is unable to get in the property in seven days and he does not want to complete the sale, he can withdraw his bid. If he is able to get in and the property is not what he wanted, he can withdraw his bid. He will have to notify Mr. Ford by 6/28 if he does not want to proceed with his bid. If the overbid is withdrawn, Mr. Ford will file an exparte petition to confirm the original bid at $980,000.00.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Creshon.

Petition To Lift Temporary Suspension And Reinstate Co Trustee Anthony F Quinones Full Accounting Of Trust Property Removed By Lynn Beuchemin And Felicia Volkman, Repayment Of Loans And Assessment Of Financial Responsibility
Off Calendar Jun-06-2007 Continued To Jul-11-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel, or other interested persons.

The Court noted the absence of appearances and continued the matter to July 11, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. The Court Examiner is to advise Kevin Ford, counsel for Lynn Quinones, of the same and instruct him to notify Anthony Quinones.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: Deputy Omar de Leon; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Pamela Meyers.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Anthony Quinones Accounting
Off Calendar Apr-24-2007 Continued To Jul-03-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Kevin Ford appearing for trustee Lynn Quinones. Anthony Quinones appeared in pro per. Mr. Ford stated that Mr. Quinones has fail to cooperate with the sale and he has moved his wife into the property. He has failed to state his position on vacating the property. Mr. Quinones argued that he has been in contact with the realtor. He has been married since 2001. He is willing to vacate the property before the close of escrow. Court wants both parties to talk outside of court.
At 10:05am, Both parties returned to court. Mr. Quinones agreed that he will try to vacate the property to help the marketing of the property. He promised to vacate the property before close of escrow. Matter is continued to 7/3 for status on accounting and sale. Mr. Quinones stated his former attorney has filed a document stating he has no control of the account and he can not file an accounting.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Soret-Matley CSR# 9225. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Anthony Quinones Accounting
Off Calendar Mar-13-2007 Continued To Apr-24-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Ford (Counsel for Lynn Quinones, Personal Representative); Carolyn Baulsier (Counsel for Anthony Quinones, Beneficiary); Anthony Quinones (Beneficiary).

Ms. Baulsier advised the Court of her inability to get the documents necessary to prepare a proper accounting and the want of cooperation from her client. Mr. Ford recited the history of the case to date noting various ostensible irregularities and the difficulties in preparing the real property for sale, including the tenancy of the wife of Mr. Quinones in said property. Mr. Quinones addressed various issues and affirmatively represented that the tenant would vacate the premises upon sale of the property. Ms. Baulsier advised the Court that she was attempting to withdraw as counsel for Mr. Quinones, either by substitution or Motion, to which Mr. Quinones consented.

In light of the foregoing, the Court ordered the parties to set specific times for the showing of the real property by the realtors. The Court authorized Ms. Baulsier to withdraw as counsel for Anthony Quinones and set the matter of the sale of the real property for status hearing on April 24, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: None; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Anthony Quinones Accounting
Off Calendar Feb-06-2007 Continued To Mar-13-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Kevin Ford appearing for Lynn Quinones. Carolyn Baulsier appearing for and with Anthony Quinones. Mr. Quinones has not filed his accounting. He is trying to get bank records. Court is suspending his powers today and his powers are remained suspended until his accounting is approved. Ms. Baulsier can not help him because he did not communicate with her. He has agreed to sign a Substution of Attorney. Court is continuing his matter to 3/13. Mr. Quinones will completely cooperate with Ms. Baulsier to prepare the accounting. The property has been listed for sale. Mr. Quinones to cooperate with the sale.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: J. Peralta.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Feb-01-2007 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carolyn Baulsier (Counsel for Anthony Quinones, Co-Trustee); Kevin Ford (Counsel for Lynn Quinones, Co-Trustee).

Ms. Baulsier advised the Court that she would be seeking leave to withdraw as counsel for Mr. Quinones due to his want of response to her various communications. After additional discussion, the Court granted the Accounting Petition of Lynn Quinones (Mr. Ford is to prepare the Order). In addition, the Court ordered Anthony Quinones to prepare and file an accounting on or before February 6, 2007. If that accounting is not so filed, his powers as trustee will be suspended and Lynn Quinones will be appointed sole Trustee. Ms. Baulsier is to advise Mr. Quinones in writing of the Court's Order prior to her withdrawal as counsel. Ms. Baulsier's Petition to Withdrawal as Counsel will be heard on February 6, 2007 as well.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Tim Kneis.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Dec-05-2006 Continued To Jan-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Carolyn Baulsier appearing for co-trustee Anthony Quinones. Kevin Ford appearing for Lynn Quinones. Parties are making slow progress. They have agreed on the listing price, terms and conditions of sale and the listing broker. Ms. Baulsier thinks her client will sign the listing agreement. Matter is continued to 1/10/07. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Ron Sinclair. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

MINI MINUTES: Kevin Ford appearing for petitioner. Carolyn Baulsier appearing for co-trustee Anthony Quinones. Ms. Baulsier informs the court that Mr. Quinones was in court but he had left. She is asking the court to execuse his appearance. He has agreed to mediation and to list the property for sale ASAP. He is working on moving out. Mr. Ford agrees to mediation. Court is referring case to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed not later than 9/6. Status is set on 9/13. Order signed. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. MINI MINUTES: Kevin Ford appearing for Lynn Quinones co-successor trustee. Carolyn Baulsier for Anthony Quinones, the other co-successor trustee. Parties agree to work out and merge the inventory. Counsel will have to subpoena for the bank statements. Anthony has agreed that property will have to be sold but he is still living there. Court will have no problem with selling the property if all parties agree. Sale will be subject to court confirmation. Matter is continued to 6/21 for status. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Kenny Lewis.
